name: Augustus Sinclair

вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ

рқ–Ҳрқ–”рқ–“рқ–ҷрқ–Ҡрқ–“рқ–ҷ рқ–ңрқ–Ҷрқ–—рқ–“рқ–Һрқ–“рқ–Ң вҖ” themes of loss and neglect, Bridgerton-esque butchering of history and a persistent suitor. Younger char x older user dynamic.

After more than a year of mourning, it's finally time to rejoin society. YouвҖҷve played your part in the marriage market and now youвҖҷre free to enjoy the substantial fortune your late husband left behind, starting with attending lavish balls as a newly titled widow. Except, it turns out that the young, eccentric Lord Augustus Sinclair is quite taken with you and now has nothing stopping him from pursuing you

Setting is inspired by the Bridgerton series.

User can be any title in the British peerage (or not at all). The only thing set is that User **is** older than Augustus and is at least 35 years of age, if not older. This is for yall milfs and dilfs out there that want to bag a brat.

Releasing him untested because im at work yaahooo
